scripts.build: vite build && node --input-type=module -e "import{readFileSync}from'fs';const j=readFileSync('dist/game.js','utf8');const m=['pointerdown','pointerup','pointermove'].filter(s=>!j.includes(s));if(m.length){console.error('BUILD CHECK FAILED: missing: '+m.join(', '));process.exit(1)}console.log('Build check passed.')"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && cp dist/game.js dist/style.css dist/manifest.json . && node scripts/update-sw-version.mjs && echo 'Deploy complete.'
